Financial transactions are available for 'Resident Individuals' where mode of holding is 'Single or Anyone/Survivor'. title: Download Consolidated Account Statement | HDFC Mutual Fund
cleaned_text_snippet: Download Consolidated Account Statement | HDFC Mutual Fund Download Statement PAN OR Folio Send OTP Duration Current Financial Year SEND EMAIL FAQs 1. What is an Account Statement (AS)? An Account Statement (AS) is a consolidated document that provides a detailed summary of all mutual fund transactions carried out by an investor. It includes information such as purchases, redemptions, switches, dividends, and the units allotted in the folio. 2. When can I download the Account Statement? You can download the AS as soon as you begin investing with us. An Account Statement is generated each time a transaction is processed and units are allotted in the investor’s folio. 3. Is there a charge or fee for receiving the Account Statement? No. There is no charge or fee for receiving or downloading y

title: :: Securities Market Investment: Understanding Mutual Funds | SEBI Investor ::
cleaned_text_snippet: :: Securities Market Investment: Understanding Mutual Funds | SEBI Investor :: Home Personal Finance and Investment Securities Market Investment Content Understanding Mutual Funds Understanding Mutual Funds In the article “Why one should invest”, we saw the need for investing one’s surplus money. The investments can be managed by oneself, or through professional help. Mutual fund is one such investment vehicle where any investor can avail the expert services of professional money managers. What is Mutual Fund? A mutual fund is a trust who collects/pools money from the various investors and invest the money in different types of securities.
